arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes honest admission on Liverpool's title hopes
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says his side must prove themselves against tougher opposition this season if they are to be considered in the fight for the Premier League title alongside Manchester City and Arsenal. Despite their optimistic start to the campaign, Liverpool boss Slot insists his side must prove themselves in upcoming tough fixtures.

arts.ttl: Ait-Nouri scores after awful Liverpool defensive mix up
arts.sum: Wolves find the equaliser against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Salah fires Liverpool back in the lead from penalty spot!
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah puts Liverpool back in the lead against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Newcastle to reignite long-standing interest in Liverpool defender in January?
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly expected to renew their interest in Liverpool defender Joe Gomez after missing out on signing Marc Guehi during the summer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool loanee Ben Doak marks personal landmark with controversial Middlesbrough goal
arts.sum: The winger notched his first professional goal but opposition players were certain that the Liverpool youngster was in an offside position.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer delivers clear response to Liverpool criticism of Newcastle penalty vs Man City
arts.sum: Newcastle United were awarded a controversial penalty in their 1-1 draw with Manchester City on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: LIVE: Liverpool look to go top of Premier League against bottom side Wolves

arts.ttl: Alisson reaffirms commitment to Liverpool amid Saudi Arabia links
arts.sum: "My faith in God makes me work hard and better and want to be the best in what I do because I believe everything I do is a way to praise God. Winning trophies and awards makes me happy, but my motivation comes from inside, my family. His absence, it seems, has given the shot stopper time to reflect on his motivations, admitting that he is committed to a future under Arne Slot despite ongoing speculation of a move to Saudi Arabia.
